sys_atf_test.description:
In ServiceNow, Journal fields like "Work notes" do not store data directly on the parent table (Loaner Request). Instead, submitting a note performs a 'write' operation on the parent record, which triggers a background 'insert' into the hidden sys_journal_field table.
Because of this teleportation, we cannot test a standard "Create" ACL for this field. Security must be enforced and tested via a "Write" ACL on Loaner Request.work_notes, even when inserting a brand new ticket.
sys_atf_test.name: Requester cannot write to Work Notes
sys_atf_test.sys_name: Requester cannot write to Work Notes
